sourceGoldVersion: frontstage gold v0.1 stabilized through Task 30

baselineRoles.packageNearestNeighbor: coarse lexical boundary regression check for package learnability
baselineRoles.feedbackNearestNeighbor: weak retrieval-style continuity baseline retained for historical comparison only
baselineRoles.feedbackBoundaryBaseline: primary feedback task-structure separability gate for blend vs nudge vs corrected-domain

notes: Baseline result files are generated on the refreshed pilot-v0.1 slice.
pilot-v0.1 and train-prep-v0.1 are synchronized from the same current gold files during cleanup and training preparation.
